meanings.definition: interrupt before its natural or planned end
examples: We had to cut short our vacation

meanings.definition: cause to end earlier than intended
examples: The spontaneous applause cut the singer short

meanings.definition: make shorter as if by cutting off
examples: Erosion has truncated the ridges of the mountains

meanings.definition: terminate or abbreviate before its intended or proper end or its full extent
examples: Personal freedom is curtailed in many countries
